title: taraxacum gurglense
intro: Taraxacum gurglense, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region, used for its medicinal properties and edible parts. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Taraxacum gurglense can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its health benefits, which include improving liver function, reducing blood pressure, and supporting immune system.
